authors: Jennifer Good University of the Arts London
raw_title: Spatiotemporal Unfixing, Image-Flow & Palinode in Photography of the Ukraine War
title_en: Spatiotemporal Unfixing, Image-Flow & Palinode in Photography of the Ukraine War
title_zh: 乌克兰战争摄影中的时空解固、图像流与反悔诗
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了乌克兰战争期间摄影作品如何打破固定的时间和空间限制，通过图像流动和视觉上的“反悔”表达来呈现复杂的战争叙事。
plain_summary_en: This article examines how photography from the Ukraine war breaks free from fixed time and space constraints, using image flow and visual 'palinode' to present complex war narratives.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代战争摄影的视觉传播机制及其对公众认知的影响。
research_direction_en: Investigating the visual communication mechanisms of war photography in the digital age and their impact on public perception.
